title: Sky Blox
description: The Sky Blox datapack is a brand new way to play Skyblock. It features a custom advancement tree that guides you through the content, as well as loads of new gameplay mechanics to allow you to obtain and automate nearly any material in the game.
body:
Sky Blox

The datapack REQUIRES this Resource Pack.

The Sky Blox map is a brand new way to play Skyblock. It is an update on the concept of a really old command block powered skyblock, this one being powered by a bunch of datapacks. It features a custom advancement tree that guides you through the content, as well as loads of new gameplay mechanics to allow you to obtain and automate nearly any material in the game.

It utilizes quite a few of my other datapacks, so make sure to install those. The datapack will prompt you to install any datapacks that are missing, as well as suggest other optional datapacks.

What to expect

Starting from a single tree and a chest containing only lava and water, you can beat the game in Skyblock. - Use hammers to obtain gravel, sand, and dirt from your cobblestone generator. - Make a Sifter to sift through these resources, obtaining ingots, crops, redstone, and more. - Progress through the resource collection to eventually automate most any resource. - Upgrade to various machines and devices to help with this process.

Learn more about how the datapack plays from this video series:





How to Install

You must install the datapack at world creation, otherwise the world won't generate as a void world. Learn how to do that from this installation video:



NOTES TO YOUTUBERS: You may use this datapack in whatever video you like, free of charge. My only request: YOU MUST CREDIT ME for my work. Simply link to this page in your video’s description, pinned comment, or both AND verbally mention during the intro of your video that the pack can be downloaded using the link. “Download in the description” would suffice. To install, follow the instructions contained in the “instructions.txt” file included in the download. If you are still having issues installing or want help knowing how to do something with the pack, ask for help on our discord. Fully Multiplayer compatible!
